mapper.sql: id, user_id, record_date, record_time, body_temperature, systolic_pressure, diastolic_pressure, heart_rate, blood_sugar, blood_sugar_type, blood_oxygen, weight, sleep_hours, sleep_quality, mood_status, physical_activity, abnormal_symptoms, measured_by, remarks, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
select
from health_monitoring where user_id = #{userId} and record_date = #{date} order by record_time desc

select DATE_FORMAT(record_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, count(*) as recordCount from health_monitoring where user_id = #{userId} and DATE_FORMAT(record_date, '%Y-%m') = #{month} group by record_date order by record_date desc

select (select count(*) from health_monitoring where DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()) as todayCount, (select count(*) from health_monitoring where YEARWEEK(create_time) = YEARWEEK(NOW())) as weekCount, (select count(*) from health_monitoring where abnormal_symptoms is not null and abnormal_symptoms != '') as abnormalCount, (select count(*) from health_monitoring) as totalCount

select
from health_monitoring where user_id = #{userId} order by record_date desc, record_time desc limit 1
mapper.insert:
insert into health_monitoring
user_id, record_date, record_time, body_temperature, systolic_pressure, diastolic_pressure, heart_rate, blood_sugar, blood_sugar_type, blood_oxygen, weight, sleep_hours, sleep_quality, mood_status, physical_activity, abnormal_symptoms, measured_by, remarks, create_time, update_time
#{userId}, #{recordDate}, #{recordTime}, #{bodyTemperature}, #{systolicPressure}, #{diastolicPressure}, #{heartRate}, #{bloodSugar}, #{bloodSugarType}, #{bloodOxygen}, #{weight}, #{sleepHours}, #{sleepQuality}, #{moodStatus}, #{physicalActivity}, #{abnormalSymptoms}, #{measuredBy}, #{remarks}, now(), now()
